examples: Even as a baby, a blue whale can make a grown man look like a minnow.
With a market of 130m people and a combined GDP of more than $70 billion, the EAC is no minnow.
This was the day when Epinal allowed France to fall in love with another minnow.
"A plastic plant isn't much interest to a minnow, but a zebrafish will spawn over one, " says Dr. Paull.
